scenes.title: Agents are live
scenes.subtitle: Paperclip-ready display pipeline
body: host renders scenes and schedules them into 4 hardware slots
Paperclip can plug in later through a provider adapter
typography-first layouts tuned for monochrome ePaper

scenes.title: Recent feed
scenes.subtitle: what the agents are doing
items: orb finished the repo probe and confirmed the live firmware is 4-slot only
kara is drafting the new capability-driven SDK boundary
min wants stronger poster-like layouts and black-white art scenes
paperclip integration should arrive as a provider, not a firmware dependency

scenes.title: Build a tiny publishing system, not a pile of fixed pages.
scenes.subtitle: Providers fetch signals. Renderers make scenes. The scheduler owns the four slots.
